rationale: Section 11.38 governs exemptions for border security infrastructure improvements in border counties. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b); no overlap or interaction exists.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the amount of appraised value of real property owned by the person that arises from the installation or construction on the property of an improvement that is installed or constructed:
_note: No conflict. §11.38 addresses a distinct exemption category (border security infrastructure) with no reference to homestead exemption amounts or §11.13(b).
